seoDescription: Review how deAPI uses cookies and similar technologies for security, authentication, and product analytics.

elements.text: This policy explains how we use cookies to secure sessions, improve reliability, and measure product performance.

hero.heading: Cookie Policy
hero.body: Learn which cookies we set, why they are used, and how your team can manage cookie preferences.

sections.title: Cookie Categories
sections.body: We use a small set of cookie categories to keep product behavior predictable and secure.

cards.title: Essential Cookies
cards.description: Required for authentication, fraud prevention, and secure account access.

cards.title: Preference Cookies
cards.description: Store language and interface preferences for a consistent user experience.

cards.title: Analytics Cookies
cards.description: Help us understand product usage trends without exposing sensitive payloads.

sections.title: Control and Retention
sections.body: You can manage cookie behavior in browser settings and with account-level controls where available.

cards.title: Browser Controls
cards.description: Disable or remove cookies through browser privacy settings at any time.

cards.title: Session Boundaries
cards.description: Authentication cookies are scoped to secure session management and expire by policy.

cards.title: Policy Requests
cards.description: Contact our team for cookie policy clarifications during legal review.

contactPanel.heading: Need a cookie policy review?
contactPanel.body: We can support legal and security teams with implementation-specific policy details.
contactPanel.responseTime: Cookie policy questions answered in one business day
